title: Multiple inheritance conflict: first parent's field definition wins
description: Dog<Animal,Creature> inherits from both Animal(name|type) and Creature(name:str(>=3)|age:int). Both parents define 'name'; the first parent Animal takes precedence (plain str, no constraint). A short name like 'ab' (length 2) must succeed because Animal's unconstrained 'name' is used, not Creature's str(>=3).
